description: Provision a complete environment for a new project named 'Project Alpha' in JFrog Artifactory. Create a Local Generic repository named 'alpha-local' and a User Group named 'alpha-team'. Create a User named 'alpha-lead' with email 'lead@alpha.project' and password 'Password123!', ensuring the user is assigned to the 'alpha-team' group. Establish a Permission Target named 'alpha-access' that grants the 'alpha-team' group Read, Annotate, and Deploy/Cache access to the 'alpha-local' repository, specifically excluding Delete or Admin/Manage privileges. Log in as 'admin' with password 'password'.
